self = session = api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo', route = 'account/address' protected_marker = 'Address Book', gate_marker = 'Returning Customer' @allure.title("Auth-required route [{route}] redirects to login gate – inline") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) @pytest.mark.parametrize( ("route", "protected_marker", "gate_marker"), [ ("account/order", "Your Orders", "Returning Customer"), ("account/edit", "Your Personal Details","Returning Customer"), ("account/wishlist", "My Wish List", "Returning Customer"), ("account/password", "Change Password", "Returning Customer"), ("account/address", "Address Book", "Returning Customer"), ], ) def test_protected_route_requires_auth_inline( self, session, api_base_url: str, route: str, protected_marker: str, gate_marker: str, ): with allure.step(f"GET {route} without authentication"): LOGGER.info("Step: unauthenticated GET %s", route) resp = session.get(_url(api_base_url, route), allow_redirects=True) with allure.step("Assert login gate shown and protected content absent"): assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK assert gate_marker in resp.text or "E-Mail Address" in resp.text, ( f"Login gate absent for route {route!r}" ) > assert protected_marker not in resp.text, ( f"Protected content {protected_marker!r} visible without auth on {route!r}" ) E AssertionError: Protected content 'Address Book' visible without auth on 'account/address' E assert 'Address Book' not in '' E E 'Address Book' is contained here: E E E E E E E E E E E E Account Login E E E E E E E E
